title.en: Integrity of game at stake over Fifa Balogun decision - Uefa
title.zh-CN: 国际足联Balogun的决定危及比赛的完整性-欧足联

summary.en: Uefa says Fifa's decision not to uphold Folarin Balogun's immediate ban at the World Cup is "unprecedented, incomprehensible and unjustifiable".
summary.zh-CN: 欧足联表示，国际足联决定不支持Folarin Balogun在世界杯上立即禁赛的决定是“前所未有的，不可理解和不合理的”。

title.en: 'You've been trying to kill me for 23 years' - should Ronaldo start?
title.zh-CN: “你已经试图杀了我23年了” -罗纳尔多应该开始吗？

summary.en: Appearing at his sixth World Cup, will Cristiano Ronaldo lift the famous trophy for the first time before he retires?
summary.zh-CN: 在他的第六届世界杯上，克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多会在退役前首次举起这座著名的奖杯吗？

title.en: How England's epic night at the Azteca unfolded
title.zh-CN: 英格兰史诗般的阿兹特克之夜是如何展开的

summary.en: Relive all the drama from England’s 3-2 win over Mexico, as Thomas Tuchel’s team progressed to a quarter-final meeting with Norway on Saturday.
summary.zh-CN: 周六，托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）的球队与挪威队进行了四分之一决赛，重温了英格兰队以3比2战胜墨西哥队的所有戏剧性事件。

title.en: Who produced another iconic performance? England player ratings
title.zh-CN: 谁制作了另一场标志性的表演？英格兰球员评分

summary.en: BBC Sport England reporter Alex Howell rates how the Three Lions players performed in the last-16 win over Mexico.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育英格兰记者亚历克斯·豪威尔（ Alex Howell ）对三狮队球员在过去16场战胜墨西哥的比赛中的

title.en: How England used five mini games to beat Mexico
title.zh-CN: 英格兰如何用五场迷你比赛击败墨西哥

summary.en: The tactical breakdown of how Thomas Tuchel's 10-man England pulled off a remarkable World Cup win in a hostile Mexico City.
summary.zh-CN: 托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）的10人英格兰队在充满敌意的墨西哥城取得了非凡的世界杯胜利的战术崩溃。

title.en: The numbers behind Spain defence chasing World Cup history
title.zh-CN: 西班牙防守队员追逐世界杯历史背后的数字

summary.en: With Spain yet to concede at the 2026 World Cup and on the brink of another tournament record, BBC Sport examines the numbers behind the shutouts.
summary.zh-CN: 由于西班牙尚未在2026年世界杯和另一项锦标赛纪录的边缘让步， BBC Sport检查了关闭背后的数字。

title.en: Bellingham scores two in 98 seconds to silence the Azteca
title.zh-CN: 贝灵汉在98秒内以2分击败阿兹特克

summary.en: Jude Bellingham scores two goals in 98 seconds to give England a 2-0 lead over Mexico during their last 16 match at the Mexico City Stadium.
summary.zh-CN: 裘德·贝林汉姆（ Jude Bellingham ）在墨西哥城体育场的最后16场比赛中，在98秒内打进2球，让英格兰队以2比0领先

title.en: 'Nasty, nasty challenge' - Quansah shown red card
title.zh-CN: “讨厌，讨厌的挑战” - Quansah出示红牌

summary.en: England are reduced to 10 men as Jarrel Quansah is shown a red card following a VAR review for a "nasty" challenge on Mexico's Jesus Gallardo.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队减少到10人，因为Jarrel Quansah在墨西哥的Jesus Gallardo进行了“令人讨厌”的挑战后，在VAR评论后显示了一张红牌。

title.en: 'I'm speechless' - Kane reacts to England's victory over Mexico
title.zh-CN: “我哑口无言” --凯恩对英格兰战胜墨西哥的反应

summary.en: A very hoarse sounding England captain Harry Kane gives his reaction to England's 3-2 victory over Mexico and praises the fans support.
summary.zh-CN: 听起来很沙哑的英格兰队队长哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）对英格兰队以3比2战胜墨西哥队做出了反应，并赞扬了球迷的支持。

title.en: What Haaland's home town did when Norway beat Brazil
title.zh-CN: 当挪威击败巴西时，哈兰德的家乡做了什么

summary.en: Watch how Erling Haaland's hometown of Bryne reacted to their hero scoring both goals as Norway knocked out Brazil to advance to the quarter-final of the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 观看Erling Haaland的家乡Bryne在挪威击败巴西晋级世界杯四分之一决赛时如何回应他们的英雄进球。

title.en: Where does Mexico win rank among England's best results?
title.zh-CN: 墨西哥在哪里赢得英格兰最好的成绩？

summary.en: BBC Sport looks at some of England's most famous away victories after their epic win against Mexico at the Azteca - plus you can have your say.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育频道（ BBC Sport ）回顾了英格兰在阿兹特克（ Azteca ）战胜墨西哥后取得的一些最著名的客场胜利-此外，您还可以发表意见。

title.en: Beever-Jones signs new contract until 2030 with Chelsea
title.zh-CN: Beever-Jones与切尔西签订新合同，直至2030年

summary.en: England forward Aggie Beever-Jones signs a new contract with Chelsea, extending her stay at the club she joined as a nine-year-old until 2030.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰前锋阿吉·比弗-琼斯（ Aggie Beever-Jones ）与切尔西（ Chelsea ）签订了一份新合同，将她在9岁时加入的俱乐部的逗留

title.en: The man England will fear most - Haaland fires Norway to history
title.zh-CN: 英格兰最害怕的人-哈兰德将挪威烧成历史

summary.en: Erling Haaland has scored seven goals in four World Cup games and he is the striker that nobody wants to face as he fires Norway into an historic quarter-final.
summary.zh-CN: 埃尔林·哈兰德（ Erling Haaland ）在世界杯的四场比赛中打进了7球，当他将挪威队打入历史性的四分之一决赛时，他是没有人愿意面对的前锋。

title.en: World Cup referees are just not good enough - Tuchel
title.zh-CN: 世界杯裁判不够好- Tuchel

summary.en: England head coach Thomas Tuchel says referees at the World Cup "are just not good enough" after the dramatic last-16 win over Mexico.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰主教练托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）表示，在过去16场戏剧性的战胜墨西哥之后，世界杯的裁判“还不够好”。

title.en: Arsenal sign Germany striker Cerci on free
title.zh-CN: 阿森纳免费签下德国前锋塞尔西

summary.en: Arsenal have confirmed the signing of Germany striker Selina Cerci from Hoffenheim on a free transfer.
summary.zh-CN: 阿森纳已经确认了德国前锋塞琳娜·塞尔西（ Selina Cerci ）从霍芬海姆（ Hoffenheim ）签下免费转会。

title.en: Ageing Brazil need major surgery - but is Ancelotti the man to do it?

summary.en: There was nothing unlucky about Brazil's loss to Norway in the last 16 of the World Cup and their exit at this stage is an unmitigated disaster, writes Tim Vickery.

title.en: England into quarter-finals - what is their path to the final?

summary.en: BBC Sport takes a look at what England will need to do to reach the final after progressing the quarter-finals.

summary.en: BBC Sport World Cup pundits Wayne Rooney, Joe Hart, and Micah Richards look at how "absolute monster" Erling Haaland inspired Norway to victory over Brazil in the last 16 of the World Cup.

summary.en: Austin MacPhee helped steer Aston Villa to European glory and now is integral to Portugal's hopes of winning the World Cup.

summary.en: From comparisons with Norway, undervalued broadcasting deals and unfulfilled potential, Ian Wright says he feels sorry for Scottish football fans - but is the former England striker right?

summary.en: Portugal head coach Roberto Martinez says "redundancy made me as a manager" as he recounts his time at Motherwell.

summary.en: Was that England's greatest World Cup win on foreign soil? Sir Geoff Hurst has asked the question himself, suggesting that the 3-2 win over Mexico in the round of 16 might be the best performance...

summary.en: Cristiano Ronaldo has confirmed the 2026 World Cup will be his last as a player.

summary.en: England held on for an excruciating 3-2 win against Mexico thanks to a heroic defensive performance to book their place in the quarter-finals of the World Cup.

title.en: Haaland sends Norway into quarter-finals as Brazil crash out

summary.en: Erling Haaland scores twice for Norway as they beat Brazil 2-1 at the New York New Jersey Stadium to reach the quarter-finals of the World Cup for the first time.

title.en: Haaland double fires Norway into World Cup quarter-finals

summary.en: Erling Haaland scores twice as Norway knock out five-time champions Brazil, and progress to the quarter-finals of the 2026 World Cup.
